events.text: Goal!  Belgium 1, Tunisia 0. Eden Hazard (Belgium) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Ferjani Sassi (Tunisia) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Belgium 2, Tunisia 0. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Dries Mertens   following a fast break.
Goal!  Belgium 2, Tunisia 1. Dylan Bronn (Tunisia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Wahbi Khazri with a cross   following a set piece situation.
Goal!  Belgium 3, Tunisia 1. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Thomas Meunier with a through ball.
Goal!  Belgium 4, Tunisia 1. Eden Hazard (Belgium) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Toby Alderweireld with a through ball.
Goal!  Belgium 5, Tunisia 1. Michy Batshuayi (Belgium) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Youri Tielemans with a cross.
Goal!  Belgium 5, Tunisia 2. Wahbi Khazri (Tunisia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Hamdi Nagguez.
